final:
module top_module(
  input in,
  input Vth_high,
  input Vth_low,
  output out
);reg inverted_out; // register to store previous state of output signal

  always @(in, Vth_high, Vth_low, inverted_out) begin
    if (in > Vth_high) begin
      inverted_out <= 1'b1; // set output to high
    end else if (in < Vth_low) begin
      inverted_out <= 1'b0; // set output to low
    end else begin
      inverted_out <= inverted_out; // hold previous state
    end
  end

  assign out = inverted_out; // assign output to stored value

endmodule
